---
title: "Héctor Tajahuerce Alcalá"
---

[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> hector.tajahuerce@gmail.com](mailto:hector.tajahuerce@gmail.com) | [<i class="bi bi-phone"></i> +34 640 61 14 60](tel:+34640611460) | <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Valencia, Spain

## Currículum Vitae

### Education

**Double Degree: Sociology & Political Science / Public Administration** | 2023 – 2028 (expected)  
*Universitat de València* | Valencia, Spain  
Five-year double degree combining sociological theory and methods with political institutions, public policy, and comparative politics. Coursework encompasses qualitative and quantitative research methods, international relations theory, political analysis, and institutional governance.

**Erasmus Exchange Programme** | Sep. 2026 – Jun. 2027  
*Université Libre de Bruxelles (ULB)* | Brussels, Belgium  
Year-long academic exchange at a leading European research university, with coursework focused on European politics, security studies, and international political affairs.

**Baccalauréat – Bilingual French/Spanish Programme** | 2009 – 2023  
*Lycée Français International de Valence* | Valencia, Spain  
Bilingual secondary education under the French national curriculum. Awarded the French Baccalauréat with honours.

### Professional Experience

**Short-Term Mobility – Hybrid Warfare & Disinformation** | April 2026  
*FORTHEM Alliance / University of Latvia* | Riga, Latvia  
Intensive programme on hybrid information warfare, disinformation, cybersecurity, and strategic communication. Included institutional study visits to the Latvian Ministry of Defence and the Cabinet of Ministers, with exposure to Baltic security perspectives and NATO's eastern flank threat assessments.

**Outreach Representative** | Summer 2024  
*UNHCR – United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees* | Valencia, Spain  
Public representation of UNHCR's humanitarian mandate through direct outreach campaigns. Developed communication skills in multicultural environments while raising awareness of the global refugee crisis and international protection frameworks.

**Internship Observer – University Management** | 2024  
*Universitat Jaume I* | Castellón, Spain  
Observed and analysed the organisational structures and administrative processes of a Spanish public university, with a focus on institutional governance and faculty management.

### Skills & Languages

- **Languages:** Spanish (native), French (native), English (Professional Working Proficiency), Valencian (basic), Portuguese (learning)
- **Research Methods:** Qualitative analysis (Atlas.ti), quantitative analysis (SPSS), policy research and drafting
- **Technical:** Excel (advanced), SPSS (advanced), Python (basic), AI & LLMs
- **Other:** Political analysis, briefing preparation, international affairs monitoring

<br>

## Investigaciones

```{=html}
<div class="d-flex flex-row flex-nowrap overflow-auto pb-3 gap-4" style="scrollbar-width: thin; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;">
  <div class="card shadow-sm flex-shrink-0" style="width: 250px; border-radius: 2px;">
    <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column justify-content-end align-items-start text-start p-4">
      <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/392898718" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
        <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.1rem;">Valencian Citizens' National Identity in the Current Context (2024)</h5>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="card shadow-sm flex-shrink-0" style="width: 250px; border-radius: 2px;">
    <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column justify-content-end align-items-start text-start p-4">
      <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.1rem;">AI and defence policy in the United States</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

<br>

## Proyectos

```{=html}
<div class="d-flex flex-row flex-nowrap overflow-auto pb-3 gap-4" style="scrollbar-width: thin; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;">
  <div class="card shadow-sm flex-shrink-0" style="width: 250px; border-radius: 2px;">
    <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column justify-content-end align-items-start text-start p-4">
      <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.1rem;">Visuales y Gráficos de Defensa en R</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

<br>

## Artículos

```{=html}
<div class="d-flex flex-row flex-nowrap overflow-auto pb-3 gap-4" style="scrollbar-width: thin; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;">
  <div class="card shadow-sm flex-shrink-0" style="width: 250px; border-radius: 2px;">
    <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column justify-content-end align-items-start text-start p-4">
      <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.1rem;">Primer Artículo (Próximamente)</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  // Force scroll to top on refresh
  if ('scrollRestoration' in history) {
    history.scrollRestoration = 'manual';
  }
  
  // Clear the URL hash if it exists to prevent browser from auto-scrolling to it
  if (window.location.hash) {
    history.replaceState(null, null, window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
  }
  
  // Scroll to top immediately, and again after a short delay in case Quarto tries to override
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
  setTimeout(() => window.scrollTo(0, 0), 100);

  // Dispose Quarto/Bootstrap's default scrollspy so it doesn't fight with our custom one
  setTimeout(() => {
    try {
      if (typeof bootstrap !== 'undefined') {
        const spy = bootstrap.ScrollSpy.getInstance(document.body);
        if (spy) spy.dispose();
      }
    } catch(e) {}
  }, 100);

  const tocLinks = document.querySelectorAll('#TOC a');
  const sections = Array.from(tocLinks).map(link => {
    try { return document.querySelector(link.getAttribute('href')); } catch(e) { return null; }
  }).filter(s => s !== null);

  if (tocLinks.length > 0 && sections.length > 0) {
    const updateActive = () => {
      let currentSection = sections[0];
      const offset = window.innerHeight / 3;
      
      // If at the very bottom, force highlight the last section
      if ((window.innerHeight + window.scrollY) >= document.documentElement.scrollHeight - 10) {
        currentSection = sections[sections.length - 1];
      } else {
        // Find the last section that has crossed the top third threshold
        sections.forEach(section => {
          const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
          if (rect.top <= offset) {
            currentSection = section;
          }
        });
      }

      if (currentSection) {
        const id = currentSection.getAttribute('id');
        tocLinks.forEach(l => {
          if (l.getAttribute('href') === '#' + id) {
            l.classList.add('active');
          } else {
            l.classList.remove('active');
          }
        });
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('scroll', updateActive, {passive: true});
    
    // Also update on click to ensure immediate feedback
    tocLinks.forEach(link => {
      link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        setTimeout(updateActive, 50);
      });
    });

    // Trigger once on load
    setTimeout(updateActive, 150);
  }
});
</script>
```
